name: eclipticam-v3w
pedestal_notes: Sensor black level in libcamera's 16-bit container — measured 2026-06-12 as the minimum mean across deep-night (00:00-03:00 UTC) frames from 3 nights of v3w data. Slightly above the documented IMX708 black level (~4096) due to dark current. Use as fixed zero point so 'stops above pedestal' is comparable across nights.
plate_scale_notes: Module 3 Wide, 102 deg horizontal / 2304 px at the half-res capture mode in use (native 4608x2592).
night_layout_notes: TRANSITIONAL: live v3w_uploader.py still writes to night/<night>/v3w/HH/<epoch_ms>.fits.fz. The post-split camera name 'eclipticam-v3w' resolves the legacy 'v3w' subcam via the percam reader. Once the uploader is migrated, flip to 'canonical' (per DECISIONS.md 2026-06-16): <frames_root>/YYYY/MM/DD/eclipticam-v3w/night/HH/HH-MM-SS.fits.fz. brightness.csv already lands at the canonical path (astro.brightness_log.append writes there directly).
